ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the author of the tweet */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the author */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was created */,
  "is_reply" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a reply */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "possible_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter Web App) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numeric value representing the sentiment of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Text label describing the sentiment */,
  "urls" TEXT /* JSON array of URLs included in the tweet */,
  "media_urls" TEXT /* JSON array of media URLs included in the tweet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* JSON array of hashtags included in the tweet */,
  "mentioned_users" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs mentioned in the tweet */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated field representing the overall engagement */,
  "in_reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this tweet is replying to */,
  "retweeted_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that was retweeted */,
  "quoted_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that was quoted */,
  "is_duplicate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a duplicate */,
  "is_spam" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is spam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the author */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL for the author's profile image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the author has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the author follows */,
  "tweets_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets posted by the author */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated field representing the overall engagement of the author's tweets */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
